# Development Prompt

Use this prompt when implementing a feature or changing existing behavior.

## Task
Implement the requested change while following the repository architecture and project constraints.

## Guidelines
- Keep the domain layer expressive and invariant-driven.
- Place infrastructure and API concerns outside the core domain.
- Use small, testable changes.
- Update documentation when the behavior or architecture changes.

## Output format
- What changed
- Why it was implemented this way
- Any follow-up considerations
